body: Hey Amara, hope your new year is off to a strong start! I wanted to follow up on our conversation from last month about the overlap we're seeing in climate infrastructure deals — it feels like [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) and our team at Initialized are bumping into each other more often in the same cap tables, which honestly seems like a good sign for the space. I've got a founder coming through next week building grid-edge storage software who I think is right in your sweet spot, and I'd love to get your read on them before they go too wide with the raise. Would you be open to a quick intro call Thursday or Friday afternoon? Let me know what works and I'll send over the deck in advance.
